neutral.final_help:
Charon is an AI assistant CLI for chat, memory recall, saved preferences, and agent status.

Usage: charon <command> [options]

Commands:
  chat                    Start an interactive chat session
  recall <query>          Search saved memory for relevant context
  remember <text>         Save a note or preference to memory
  loops                   List and manage judge/optimization loops
  status                  Show current agent, project, and loop status

Options:
  -h, --help              Show this help message and exit
  --json                  Output machine-readable JSON where supported
  --state-dir DIR         Use DIR for Charon state and memory files
  --verbose               Show extra diagnostic output

Examples:
  charon chat
  charon recall "deployment notes"
  charon remember "Prefer concise status updates"
  charon status --json

adversarial.final_help:
Charon CLI — agent workflows, memory, and optimization loops

Usage:
  charon <command> [options]
  charon chat [options]
  charon recall <query> [options]
  charon remember <text> [options]
  charon loops [options]
  charon status [options]

Commands:
  chat       Start an interactive Charon chat session.
  recall     Search saved memory and past conversation context.
  remember   Save a note, preference, or project fact to memory.
  loops      List judge/optimization loops and inspect their current progress.
  status     Show the current runtime, agent, and state-directory status.

Options:
  --help            Show this help message and exit.
  --json            Emit machine-readable JSON output when supported.
  --state-dir DIR   Use DIR as the Charon state directory.
  --verbose         Print additional diagnostic details.

Examples:
  charon chat
  charon recall "build command"
  charon remember "Prefer concise CLI output"
  charon loops --json
  charon status --verbose
